notes: Fixed the Instruments actions menu. (1) Positioning: the Actions popover appeared stuck at the bottom of the screen on mobile — it now anchors directly under the button, flips above when there isn't room below, and clamps to the viewport horizontally. (2) Selection: tapping a menu item (Redeem / Step up / Pause / Resume / Close) often did nothing because the outside-click handler closed the menu on the same tap before the item registered — the listener now attaches deferred, uses capture phase with an inside-menu guard, so item taps reliably fire. With selection working, Redeem opens the Journal redeem modal (real transaction), and Close/Step/Pause/Resume open the timeline editor whose Save writes the event to the instrument, shows it in the card's history, and recomputes the Projection + Net Worth. Larger menu touch targets for mobile.
